title: Originals
subtitle: How Non-Conformists Move the World
author: Adam Grant
themes: The originality paradox: doubt coexists with courage
Risk mitigation as the hidden engine of innovation
Volume of ideas drives quality of breakthroughs
Powerless communication as a persuasion tool
Tempered radicals and coalition-building for change
Groupthink, dissent, and cultures of originality
awards: One of Amazon's Best Books of the Year (2016)
One of Financial Times' Best Business Books of 2016
excerpt: The greatest originals are not fearless risk-takers. They are careful contrarians who learn to question defaults, balance their risk portfolios, and move when the odds tilt in their favor.
